module.name: phyto_acclimation_bundler
module.description: Automatically suggests acclimation accessories in the cart when a tissue-culture or deflasked plant is added, helping buyers get everything they need in one order. Triggers can be based on Phyto Growth Stage IDs or product tags, and a configurable bundle discount rewards customers who add all kit items at once. The dismissable cart widget shows up to a configurable number of kit products with images and prices.
module.author: PhytoCommerce
